positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a mountain range silhouette at sunset. The scene features crisp, geometric mountain peaks rising above a calm, flat horizon line. Incorporate flowing abstract lines and subtle celestial elements like abstract stars or moons into the sky. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and muted gold. The overall aesthetic should be retro-futuristic and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouette style, flat design, vectorial art, extreme contrast, central composition.
